ol.li: Ordering Invariant: Metadata logs MUST reach stable storage in the journal and be closed by a JE_COMMIT (Step 2) before the metadata is permitted to be applied to the Main FS inode_table (Step 4).
Idempotency: Replaying the journal during recovery (scanning from last valid JE_COMMIT backwards) must result in a consistent state even if interrupted and restarted.
Atomic Block Unit: The 4096B block write remains the atomic unit of the underlying block device; journal entries spanning blocks must use checksums to verify partial writes.

ul.li: Write Amplification: 1.0x (Metadata logged + Data written once)
Risk: User data blocks may contain stale data if crash occurs after metadata commit but before data write completes.
Write Amplification: 2.0x (All data written to journal THEN to disk)
Safety: Full data integrity. Atomic "all or nothing" for data blocks.
Risk: Significant I/O throughput penalty (usually >50% reduction).
